text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I reeled in a big haul today. Boat
fishing's the best! That being said...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Phew. Waking up at 2 a.m. isn't easy on the body.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... maybe this calls for some shut-eye on this
sofa here.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... What has you sleeping in a place like
this, Sei? You're going to catch a cold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tug! Whomp! Squeeze!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Wah?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...Um? Honestly, back at it again with your silly
jokes. You really surprised me this time. Now,
could you let go—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So warm... Hehe, what a cutie you are.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Good mor—What are you two doing?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I really appreciate it. With your help, I
managed to escape her grasp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Things could get out of hand if we decide to
leave her here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sky, wake up! Sleep in your room if you have to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Good. That's right. Now let's head over to your—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Snrk! Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, why are you coming this way?! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Agh! ...Wait?! Isn't she...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Pinning me against the wall?!)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I've got you cornered now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I see what's going on here. Geez, looks
like Sky has a bad case of sleepwalking on her
hands!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll take it from here! This was a common
occurrence back at my dad's restaurant! What
you've gotta do is...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nod... Nod...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, good thing she's not stumblin' around
anymore. C'mon! Your room's this way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I'm a little lost for words.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...That was a rather unique case of sleepwalking.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mmm...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... What a great dream that was. I got to
snuggle up with a fluffy cat, and then we played
tag...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? That's strange. I thought I fell asleep in the
lobby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe my homing instinct kicked in? I'm too
smart for my own good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After handing over the training regimen to
<chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yoohoo! Yes, you, the trainer over there. Would
you be interested in eating the catch of the day?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I just reeled in a big haul this morning! So, I
wanted to share the joy is all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, today's been such a great day. I should start
planning my next fishing trip. ♪
